form.formComment: Hit the ground running and set it up early clocking 19.84 with a 1.75 lengths win at this track over 340m. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (20.39) when second at this track in a Grade 5. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Backs up quickly after winning by a nose at this track (20.17) beating Sunnybrook in a Grade 5 on April 8 three days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and he needs to find another gear.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 19.81 over 340m at this track. Has an outstanding 19.49 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth over 457m at Q Lakeside, beaten 4.5 lengths (25.80) behind Kachina Ripple in a Restricted WIN on April 4. Will find this a little easier. Has the ability to be in the finish.
